subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested the Cause, sent down the verses and made all things speak forth His remembrance, the Most Resplendent, the All-Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر الامر و انزل الایات و انطق الاشیاء بذکره البهی الابهی هو
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
